_comment: OrgPulse report data schema v2. Every field the V2 template reads must exist here. Null fields suppress the relevant section — never default to invented values.

meta.orgName: string — from Salesforce identity API or intake form

intake.useCaseLabel: string — human label, e.g. 'Service Cloud — case deflection'
intake.licenseUnitCostMonthly: number — $/user/month; default 165 (Sales Cloud Professional list price, June 2026)
intake.handlingCostPerTransaction: number | null — $ per case/opportunity/work order handled manually; null = suppress value projection
intake.handlingCostLabel: string | null — e.g. 'per case' | 'per opportunity' | 'per work order'
intake.deflectionBenchmark: number — decimal, e.g. 0.40; always sourced, never invented
intake.deflectionBenchmarkSource: string — e.g. 'Salesforce State of Service 2025, p.14'

scanMetrics.inactiveUserCount: number — users with zero logins in last 90 days
scanMetrics.abandonedPackageCount: number — packages with no activity in 18+ months
scanMetrics.abandonedPackageCost: number | null — $ annual if determinable from scan; null if not
scanMetrics.contactEmailMissingCount: number — absolute count of contacts missing email
scanMetrics.conflictingFlowObjects: string[] — object API names with conflicting flows
scanMetrics.securityHealthCheckScore: number | null — null if endpoint unavailable (e.g. Dev Edition)
scanMetrics.monthlyTransactionVolume: number | null — COUNT of primary transactional object in last 90 days ÷ 3; null if use case not set
scanMetrics.monthlyTransactionVolumeSource: string | null — SOQL description used to derive it

domainScores.name: string
domainScores.weight: number — percent weight in overall index
domainScores.benchmark: number | null — industry median score for this domain
domainScores.color: string — hex colour for score display
domainScores.barColor: string — hex colour for bar fill
domainScores.summary: string — top finding in business language, references scan metrics

findings.evidence: string — SOQL or API call that produced it

aiReadinessIndex: number 0-100 — weighted average of domain scores
verdict: string — 'Not Ready' | 'Conditionally Ready' | 'Ready for Pilot' | 'AI Ready'
headlineFinding: string — HTML string; may contain <strong> tags; references actual scan metrics

costOfInaction.packageWasteNote: string | null — how it was determined
costOfInaction.totalVerifiedWaste: number — sum of all verified waste items only

valueProjection.available: boolean — false if handlingCostPerTransaction is null; suppresses entire section
valueProjection.currentReadinessCapture: number | null — decimal: what % of value org could capture today
